raw_cv_text:
Moa Lundh
+46 70 234 5678 | moa.lundh@gmail.com | https://www.linkedin.com/in/moa-lundh
EDUCATION
Royal Institute of Technology (KTH) — M.S. in Computer Science, specialization in Distributed Systems 2007 - 2009
Lund University — B.S. in Computer Science and Mathematics 2003 - 2007
EXPERIENCE
Spotify — Principal Data Engineer Jan 2021 - Present
Architected and led adoption of real-time analytics platform processing 2.8B events/day across 400M users, reducing
query latency by 64% and enabling 12 product teams to ship features 3x faster
Established data quality framework using Monte Carlo Data and Great Expectations, reducing incidents by 82% and
achieving 99.7% SLA compliance across 300+ critical pipelines
Mentored 8 senior data engineers and 3 staff engineers on advanced streaming architecture and contributed 15
architectural decision records adopted org-wide
Uber — Staff Data Engineer Jun 2018 - Dec 2020
Designed and shipped unified data lakehouse on Delta Lake handling 1.2PB of daily ingestion for 50+ teams,
improving ETL reliability to 99.95% and reducing infrastructure costs by $4.2M annually
Built distributed feature store serving 800+ ML models with sub-100ms latency, enabling 40+ data scientists to
reduce feature engineering time by 70% and accelerate model deployment cycles
Led migration of 200+ legacy batch pipelines to Kafka + Spark Structured Streaming, eliminating 14-hour SLA
window and enabling real-time decisioning for surge pricing and dispatch algorithms
Google Cloud — Senior Data Engineer (Cloud Data Analytics) Feb 2016 - May 2018
Architected BigQuery optimization patterns adopted by 500+ enterprise customers, generating $15M incremental
ARR and published 3 technical papers on cost-efficient analytics at VLDB 2017
Designed Dataflow-based ETL framework processing 200TB+ daily across financial services, healthcare, and media
verticals with 99.98% accuracy and enabling 2,000+ analysts to run ad-hoc queries sub-second
Established data governance and lineage platform serving 100+ GCP projects, reducing compliance audit time by
76% and enabling automated PII detection across 800+ datasets
Goldman Sachs — Vice President, Data Engineering Aug 2013 - Jan 2016
Led platform team of 6 engineers to build real-time risk data pipeline ingesting 50TB daily from 15 asset classes,
reducing risk calculation latency from 8 hours to 12 minutes and supporting $2.3T trading volume
Implemented horizontally-scalable data mesh for 30+ trading desks across equities, fixed income, and derivatives,
enabling self-service BI access and reducing quant request queue by 84%
Pioneered low-latency Kafka + Flink infrastructure for market data processing, handling 40M tick events/second with
<50ms end-to-end latency for algorithmic trading strategies
Databricks — Principal Solutions Architect, Data Platform Sep 2011 - Jul 2013
Architected Delta Lake adoption strategy for Fortune 100 companies spanning retail, insurance, and automotive;
drove 8 successful implementations on 500TB+ datasets resulting in 52% improvement in data freshness
Delivered 40+ technical workshops and conference presentations on Apache Spark optimization, data governance,
and lakehouse best practices, reaching 8,000+ engineers and establishing thought leadership
Authored open source framework for automated data lineage tracking across Spark jobs, now adopted by 30+
enterprises and featured as recommended tool in Apache Spark ecosystem
PROJECTS
DataLineage (Open Source) — Python, Scala, Spark, Apache Atlas, GraphQL 2012 - 2014
Designed and open-sourced data lineage and impact analysis tool used by 2,000+ practitioners, achieving 800
GitHub stars and 95+ production deployments at scale
Demonstrated automated end-to-end column-level lineage tracking and data cost attribution across 40M+ objects,
enabling $8M+ in infrastructure cost optimization for adopting enterprises
EXTRACURRICULAR
O'Reilly Media & Data Council — Conference Speaker & Session Chair 2015 - Present
Keynoted Strata Data Conference 2018, 2019, 2021 on 'Scaling Real-Time Analytics to Billions of Events'
Organized and chaired Data Infrastructure & Engineering Summit sessions, featuring talks from 50+ engineers
reaching 3,000+ attendees
Swedish Data Engineering Society (SDES) — Board Member & Program Advisor 2017 - Present
Established Nordic Data Engineering Working Group connecting 2,000+ practitioners across Nordics for knowledge
sharing and best practice standardization
Mentored 12 emerging data engineering leaders and helped 3 transition into Principal roles at top-tier companies
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, Scala, SQL, Java, Go, Bash
Technologies – Apache Spark, Kafka, Airflow, dbt, Snowflake, BigQuery, Delta Lake, Ray, Dataflow, Flink, Protobuf,
Avro
Tools – Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Datadog, Monte Carlo Data, Great Expectations, Tableau, Looker
